race.comment: SOSUEME (1) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 1000m at Taree when fourth after being in the firing line on the bend. Finds the right race this time and can take this out. SKATES ON (13) has two placings from three starts this preparation and last start finished a narrow third over 1200m at Tuncurry. Key runner who should feature in the finish. CLAN D'ORO (16) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start when she got a long way back to run eighth over 1010m at Coffs Harbour. Perfectly placed and is sure to prove tough to beat. TIME AND RHYTHM (14) was prominent at the bend and finished third last time over 1010m at Coffs Harbour. Will trim down following recent racing and stays in the mix.
